title: Support foreach on associative arrays, etc
body:
```
module test;

   logic [15:0] test [integer];

   initial begin
      test[18] = 1;
      test[29] = 2;
      foreach(test[i]) begin
         $display("%0d", i);
      end
      $finish;
   end

endmodule
```

Expected output:
```
18
29
- test.sv:11: Verilog $finish
```

Actual output:
```
- test.sv:11: Verilog $finish
```
